_comment: Central payment configuration for Ronin Monk Media LLC. Never store private keys, passwords, or bank info here. Update status fields when account status changes. All payment button URLs on the site should trace back to this file.

paypal.label: PayPal (Active)
paypal.note: Temporary test link. Replace with Stripe when account is approved. Update status to 'retired' and set url to null at that time.

stripe.label: Stripe
stripe.note: Account under review. When approved: add publishable key, add price IDs per service, update status to 'active'. Do not store secret key here.

ronin-monk-sagas.title: Ronin Monk Sagas
ronin-monk-sagas.note: Verify this is the correct slug. Log into Gumroad to confirm.

tablets-of-lutz.title: Tablets of Lutz
tablets-of-lutz.note: Verify slug. Log into Gumroad to confirm.

neo-mycelium.title: Neo Mycelium
neo-mycelium.note: Verify slug. Log into Gumroad to confirm.

static-before-sound.title: Static Before Sound
static-before-sound.note: Log into Bandcamp to confirm album is published and price is set.

worldbuilding-consultation.title: Worldbuilding Consultation
worldbuilding-consultation.note: PayPal link active for payment. Contact form is primary CTA. Update stripe_price_id when Stripe approved.

narrative-brand-audit.title: Narrative Brand Audit
narrative-brand-audit.note: Route to contact form. PayPal available. Update stripe_price_id when Stripe approved.

ghostwriting.title: Ghostwriting
ghostwriting.note: 50% deposit required. Routed to contact form. Update stripe_price_id when Stripe approved.
